items.name: billing-contracts
items.title: Billing Contracts
items.description: Provider-neutral billing DTOs, arbitrary-precision formatters, open-status presentation maps, and explicit resource states shared by every customer billing block.

items.name: billing-ui
items.title: Billing UI Helpers
items.description: Shared formatting and presentation helpers used by the customer billing blocks.

items.name: billing-pricing-table
items.title: Billing Pricing Table
items.description: Responsive plan comparison with controlled interval selection, fixed and contact-sales pricing, current and featured states, and optional actions.

items.name: billing-subscription-card
items.title: Billing Subscription Card
items.description: Current-plan summary with independent subscription, provider, and payment status plus exact lifecycle dates and optional actions.

items.name: billing-entitlements-list
items.title: Billing Entitlements List
items.description: Structured display of plan feature flags, caps, discrete quotas, meter allowances, and neutral unknown values.

items.name: billing-usage-overview
items.title: Billing Usage Overview
items.description: Current-period usage with quota, boolean, unlimited, uninitialized, exhausted, overage, category-pool, and universal-pool states.

items.name: billing-credits-card
items.title: Billing Credits Card
items.description: Available credits grouped by compatible meter and unit with permanent, period, rollover, expiring, and unknown lot semantics.

items.name: billing-usage-history
items.title: Billing Usage History
items.description: Accessible, table-first period history with controlled meter, period, and pagination filters plus explicit quality labels.

items.name: billing-activity-table
items.title: Billing Activity Table
items.description: Paginated ledger activity with controlled filters, semantic class/type presentation, and a titled metadata detail sheet.

items.name: billing-settings-page
items.title: Billing Settings Page
items.description: Router-neutral Overview, Usage, and Plans composition that keeps subscription, usage, credits, entitlements, history, activity, and pricing failures isolated.

items.name: pack-foundation
items.title: Feature Pack Foundation
items.description: Provider-neutral resource, action-policy, error, loading, empty, and status contracts shared by Constructive feature packs.

items.name: console-runtime
items.title: Console Runtime
items.description: Endpoint, session, transport, cache partitioning, and adapter contracts for identity-scoped Constructive consoles.

items.name: console-feature-catalog
items.title: Console Feature Catalog
items.description: Validated feature-pack capability manifests and stable backend preset profiles.

items.name: console-kit-core
items.title: Constructive Console Kit Core
items.description: The leaf-independent Console Kit shell, runtime, discovery, and single modular Zustand store.

items.name: feature-pack-data
items.title: Data Feature Pack
items.description: A current-_meta-only application data explorer with application-table filtering and spreadsheet CRUD.

items.name: console-module-data
items.title: Data Console Module
items.description: Console Kit navigation, capability discovery, and tenant runtime binding for the Data feature pack.
items.docs:
## Console Kit integration

Install this item for Console Kit composition. It installs `console-kit-core` and the standalone `feature-pack-data` view transitively.

```tsx
import { dataConsoleModule } from '@/blocks/feature-packs/data/data-console-module';

const featureModules = [dataConsoleModule];
```

Pass the module to `ConstructiveConsoleKitCore` or `ConsoleKit`; install `feature-pack-data` alone when the host supplies the view props directly.

items.title: Authentication Feature Pack
items.description: Provider-neutral public authentication flows and personal account/session management.

items.name: feature-pack-users
items.title: App access Feature Pack
items.description: App access governance with member lifecycle controls, invitations, access profiles, direct and effective permissions, and new-member defaults.

items.name: console-module-users
items.title: App access Console Module
items.description: Console Kit navigation, capability discovery, and Constructive adapter for the App access feature pack.
items.docs:
## Console Kit integration

Install this item for Console Kit composition. It installs `console-kit-core` and the standalone `feature-pack-users` view transitively.

```tsx
import { usersConsoleModule } from '@/blocks/feature-packs/users/users-console-module';

const featureModules = [usersConsoleModule];
```

Pass the module to `ConstructiveConsoleKitCore` or `ConsoleKit`; install `feature-pack-users` alone when the host supplies App access resources and semantic actions directly. The module maps Console Kit's nested users routes to controlled sections while preserving the stable `users` registry ID.

items.name: console-kit-nextjs
items.title: Constructive Console Kit for Next.js
items.description: A full-page Next.js tenant console with semantic routing, auth, dynamic endpoint discovery, first-party adapters, and every feature pack.
items.docs: Install with the shadcn CLI, then render `<ConstructiveConsoleKit database={tenant} />` inside any Next.js route. Pass the secret-free database ID and explicit semantic endpoint map returned by provisioning. Omit `routes.route` for internal navigation and optionally set `routes.defaultRoute`; for URL-owned navigation, pass the parsed semantic `route` together with `getHref`, `onRouteChange`, and a Next.js `renderLink`. Install `console-kit-core` plus selected `console-module-*` items for a smaller custom composition; each console module installs its provider-neutral `feature-pack-*` view transitively. Install a `feature-pack-*` item alone when a host wants the standalone view without Console Kit. Navigation, runtime, session, capability, and pack state live in one per-instance Zustand store composed from modular slices.
